diff: Sky Core Vault Income is all income from Sky Core Vaults, including, without limitation, liquidation penalties. Sky Core Vaults include, without limitation, (1) all Sky Core Vaults specified in [A.3.7.1.1.1 - Vault Types](64971463-0650-4462-b9c4-1eecb704fa1a) and (2) the Sky Core Vault associated with SKY-Backed Borrowing (see [A.4.4.1.3 - SKY-Backed Borrowing](264b1787-cd75-4d28-9c14-c7d5a724eba7)).

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
